description: FastMCP Cloud, now presented as Prefect Horizon, is a managed platform for deploying and governing MCP servers. It lets users connect GitHub-hosted FastMCP projects to hosted MCP endpoints with built-in authentication and access control.
summary: fastmcp.cloud markets Prefect Horizon, which exposes hosted remote MCP server endpoints; public docs show tenant/server URLs but do not document a first-party REST/GraphQL API, CLI, or Horizon-issued developer credential for the fastmcp.cloud domain itself.
